frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture being placed through both marks on drain

confidence_rationale: Video quality and camera angles make precise measurement of suture placement deviation difficult. Task completion and timing are clearly visible, but penalty assessment is limited by viewing perspective.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from marks - camera angle and resolution insufficient for precise measurement
Whether any gap exists in drain closure - viewing angle obscures detail
technique_summary: Good intermediate to expert level performance with efficient knot formation and placement. Completion time of 126 seconds falls within intermediate range.
strengths: Good use of knot pusher for advancement
improvement_suggestions: Work on faster needle loading to achieve expert benchmark
Practice to reduce overall time toward 100 second expert range
